name: config-bootstrap
description: Lay down the per-machine MAST bootstrap config C:\WIS\config.toml (machine identity + how to reach the config DB: machine_role/site/project/controller_host/database/domain/location). The machine's role is injected as the top-level machine_role key; the remaining fields are the selected site profile (sites/<site>.toml), chosen at build time via build-mast.ps1 -Site (per-site, identical across machines at a site). There is no MAST_PROJECT environment variable. Read by MAST_common load_local_config(); the app cross-checks it against the DB 'sites' doc and fails fast on mismatch. Runs early (order 150) so the file exists before the mast-unit service is installed.
